event_label: 2025-11-27 | BOJ | Economic Activity, Prices, and Monetary Policy in Japan

interpretation: The official event is represented by ANAS as a monetary_policy, macro_growth, inflation, trade_policy exposure with currency pressure around JPY, USD, CHF, EUR.
